since_last: 74% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.74%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 74% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.58% · BTC -1.80% · Gold +0.98% · Nasdaq100 +1.36%. 74% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.74%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.74%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.49%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +11.50%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +11.50%, AMBA +9.75%, AMD +8.93%, ANET +8.69%, VRT +8.67%. Laggards: AVAV -4.92%, INTU -3.45%, UPST -2.67%, HON -2.40%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.49% at $161.21
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
